title: Nuage Total Makeup Remover Wipes, 2 Pack Plof025022
features: DAILY USE: Nuage Make up Remover Wipes. Safe to use daily, perfect for home, gym bag, travel bag, twin pack size includes 50 individual ready to use wipes. Use all year round on any skin type
CALMING & SOOTHING: Infused with Aloe Vera extracts, to calm and soothe skin, the wipes are suitable for all skin types including sensitive skin.

SUN SKIN: Aloe Vera is widely accepted to calm and soothe skin, after sun exposure at home or on holiday, wipe skin where the sun has touched to bring comfort and moisture easily and quickly. Sunburn requires additional treatment.
TWIN PACK SIZE: Nuage Makeup Remover Wipes, supplied in resealable packs of 25 wipes. Two packs supplied
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Twin Pack. Each resealable pack contains 25 wipes
description: Product Description Nuage Make up Remover Wipes. Safe to use daily, perfect for home, gym bag, travel bag, twin pack size includes 50 individual ready to use wipes. Infused with Aloe Vera extracts, to calm and soothe skin, the wipes are suitable for all skin types including sensitive skin. Twin Pack, each resealable pack contains 25 wipes Directions 1. Open the resealable pack. 2. Take out a wipe. 3. Gently wipe the face or other areas where makeup is applied. 4.
